description:
Parent epic: V3 E2: Agents, chat turns, and sessions

Source task 4/10 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Verify `Jidoka.Session` is a plain descriptor, not a process or store.

Epic closure criteria:
- `chat/3` is the one public turn primitive
- sessions are clearly addressing, not durability
- session and chat tests cover happy paths and edge cases

comments.text: Added an explicit boundary test proving Session.new!/1 creates only a plain descriptor: no process starts, no transcript fields are present, and snapshot fails with session_agent_not_running until the runtime agent exists. Verified format, compile --warnings-as-errors, and full mix test.

title: E2: Verify Jidoka.Session is a plain descriptor, not a process or store
